text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe puts on a great performance and
holds her own even against the senior year racers.
However...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The gap widened again...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: At the Kikuka Sho... I was closer to her... But why?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, Cafe? Nice running out there today.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do not speak to her, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? But why not, Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I realized as we were running together. We cannot
involve ourselves with her. At least, not at the
track.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That one is... unlike us. She is one who ventures to
strange worlds...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: She is... the companion of Leckermaul.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Lick 'em all...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Cafe! That was quite fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Heading through the runners' tunnel, we're
engulfed in joyous cheers.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I really think so. Figuratively speaking, it's as if
this is the calm before your storm! I wonder how
far you'll be able to go?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's find out next year. Or rather, allow me to
observe as you find out. How exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon buzzes with exhilaration.
Manhattan Cafe, however, is standing completely
still and looks deathly pale.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer... My friend... My friend has...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: She's... faster now... Much, much faster...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we head home, I struggle to come to terms
with what Manhattan Cafe said.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's as if... she sped up in response to me getting
faster...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But why... Why?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Why, why, why?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the sound of a nail breaking. Although her
weight has been stable for a while...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shadow hanging over Manhattan Cafe lingers
on. Like it's a curse... or some step we can't skip...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I can catch her. I'll prove it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Next year, I'll do it... I'm different now. I'm not
weak anymore...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What should our next goal be?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like something just... walloped me in the
stomach. Something with... a powerful hold over
me...
choice_data_list: Next up... is the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho... That's a 3,200 meter
race...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
So you think I'll have a better chance of reaching
my friend if the race is that long?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing wrong with our approach. We've
set our sights on a big G1 race in the spring, and
there's no better example than the spring Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But what I said just now... Was that really my idea?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack! Crack, crack!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you I can catch up to her. I know I can do
it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe's classic year comes to an end
after a quiet spring and a successful fall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not as frail as she used to be... but a deep
yearning has taken root inside her—something
profoundly... melancholic.
